name: Amy Carmichael
title: Missionary to India
bio: Irish Christian missionary who served in India for 55 years without furlough. She founded the Dohnavur Fellowship and devoted her life to rescuing children from temple prostitution. She wrote 35 books about her missionary work.
faith: Carmichael gave her entire life to serving the most vulnerable in India. She rescued hundreds of children from abuse and exploitation, establishing a community that still operates today. Her writings on the cost of discipleship continue to inspire missionaries worldwide.

sources.title: Amy Carmichael — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the missionary who served 55 years in India

sources.title: Things As They Are: Mission Work in Southern India
sources.note: By Amy Carmichael. Her honest account of missionary life

sources.title: If
sources.note: By Amy Carmichael. Her devotional classic on sacrificial love

tagline: Rescued hundreds of children in India and served without furlough for 55 years
